author: orbisai0security
message:
Check allocation size multiplication overflow

Use `sc_allocarray()` to prevent multiplication overflow.

PR #6930 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6930>

Signed-off-by: Romain Vimont <rom@rom1v.com>

author: QwertyChouskie
message:
Improve warning formatting in README.md

This makes it stand out more (and just looks nicer).

PR #6395 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6395>

Signed-off-by: Romain Vimont <rom@rom1v.com>

author: Romain Vimont
message:
Fail early on zero-sized video

This avoids potential division-by-zero crashes.

Refs #6905 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/issues/6905>
PR #6911 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6911>

author: Romain Vimont
message:
Fix data race

Fields in `struct sc_screen` were written from the decoder thread and
read from the main thread without proper synchronization.

Contrary to what the comment stated, pushing an SDL event does not
provide the synchronization required to make these writes visible to the
main thread.

Pass the session size as data attached to the SDL event to fix the
issue.

Refs #6905 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/issues/6905>
PR #6911 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6911>

author: Romain Vimont
message:
Extract function to dequeue events

Expose a function to dequeue a single specific event from the SDL event
queue.

PR #6911 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6911>

author: Romain Vimont
message:
Rename sc_delay_buffer to sc_video_regulator

This component serves the same purpose for video as the audio regulator
does for audio: maintaining a fixed target latency.

Rename it to "video regulator" for consistency.

PR #6918 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6918>

author: Romain Vimont
message:
Do not print escape sequences if unsupported

On Windows, the escape sequences used to save and restore the current
terminal title are not always supported. In that case, they must not be
emitted; otherwise, they would be printed verbatim.

PR #6825 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6825>

author: Romain Vimont
message:
Restore terminal title on exit

Save the initial terminal title and restore it when exiting.

From <https://invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html>:

    Ps = 2 2 ; 2  ->  Save xterm window title on stack.
    Ps = 2 3 ; 2  ->  Restore xterm window title from stack.

PR #6825 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6825>

author: zxmpg41
message:
Add --no-terminal-title

Add an option to disable terminal title updates.

PR #6825 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6825>

Signed-off-by: Romain Vimont <rom@rom1v.com>

author: zxmpg41
message:
Set terminal tab title to scrcpy and device name

On startup, set the terminal tab/window title to "scrcpy" so the tab
is immediately identifiable. Once the device is connected, update the
title to "scrcpy - <device name>" (or "scrcpy - <window-title>" if
--window-title is provided). On exit, clear the title so the shell can
restore its own.

OSC 0 escape sequences are used for cross-platform support (Windows
Terminal, macOS Terminal, xterm). On Windows, SetConsoleTitleW() is
also called as a fallback for legacy console hosts (cmd.exe, conhost).

The same behaviour applies in OTG mode.

PR #6825 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6825>

Signed-off-by: Romain Vimont <rom@rom1v.com>

author: Romain Vimont
message:
Fix SDL colorspace for AVCOL_SPC_YCGCO

`AVCOL_SPC_YCGCO` has no corresponding `SDL_Colorspace` value.

Treat it as BT.709, like `AVCOL_SPC_UNSPECIFIED`.

Fixes #6924 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/issues/6924>

author: Romain Vimont
message:
Log texture details in verbose mode

Refs #6830 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/issues/6830>
Refs #6924 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/issues/6924>

author: Romain Vimont
message:
Fix checkstyle warning

Fix the following checkstyle warning:

> Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use
> `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use
> `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.

author: Romain Vimont
message:
Use OpenGL for camera to adapt to the target size

The camera stream can only be rendered on a surface matching the input
size. If the video constraints change the size, an intermediate OpenGL
filter is required.

For example, since 1080 is not a multiple of 16, running scrcpy as
follows:

    scrcpy --video-source=camera --camera-size=1920x1080 \
           --min-size-alignment=16

resulted in:

    ERROR: Camera configuration error

An intermediate OpenGL filter allows adapting the size without error.

Fixes #6919 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/issues/6919>
PR #6922 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6922>

author: Romain Vimont
message:
Only apply alignment constraint for camera

Once the camera size has been selected, do not apply any encoder maximum
size constraints. Only adjust the size for alignment.

Refs #6919 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/issues/6919>
PR #6922 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6922>

author: Romain Vimont
message:
Add --ignore-video-encoder-constraints

Some encoders report incorrect capabilities (size or alignment). Add an
option to ignore these constraints.

Fixes #6904 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/issues/6904>

author: eret9616
message:
Trigger media scan after file push

When a file is dropped onto the scrcpy window, it is pushed to the
device using `adb push`, which does not trigger a media scan.

Manually request the media scanner to scan the "push directory" so that
the new files immediately appear in Android apps.

Fixes #6200 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/issues/6200>
PR #6852 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6852>

Signed-off-by: Romain Vimont <rom@rom1v.com>

author: Romain Vimont
message:
Add a method to send a broadcast

Implement the equivalent of `Context.sendBroadcast(Intent)`.

PR #6852 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6852>

author: yangfl
message:
Add Keywords to desktop entries

Add search keywords to the .desktop files so users can find scrcpy more
easily in application launchers.

PR #6889 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6889>

Signed-off-by: Romain Vimont <rom@rom1v.com>

author: Romain Vimont
message:
Simplfy memcpy() parameters

Remove useless cast to `char *`, and use `SC_DEVICE_NAME_FIELD_LENGTH`
directly.

Refs #6744 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6744>
Refs #6875 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6875>

author: Romain Vimont
message:
Add static_assert for memcpy() size

This guarantees that the string resulting from `memcpy()` is safe:
 - it copies to valid memory;
 - it is null-terminated.

Refs #6744 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6744>
Refs #6875 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6875>

author: Romain Vimont
message:
Reject recording VP8 in MP4

Muxing VP8 into an MP4 container is not supported.

PR #6769 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6769>

author: Romain Vimont
message:
Fix VPx recording

Contrary to the other video codecs, a VP8 (and sometimes VP9) video
stream does not contain config packets.

PR #6769 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6769>

author: pngocthach
message:
Add support for VP8 and VP9 video encoders

Fixes #6763 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/issues/6763>
PR #6769 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6769>

Signed-off-by: Romain Vimont <rom@rom1v.com>

author: Romain Vimont
message:
Apply encoder size constraints only after failure

The reported video encoder size constraints may be incorrect. Only apply
them if encoding fails at the requested size.

Refs #6829 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/issues/6829>
Fixes #6848 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/issues/6848>
PR 6859 <https://github.com/Genymobile/scrcpy/pull/6859>
